3266880.name: Chicken TD: Defenders of the Coop
3266880.description:
Chicken TD is a tower defense game where the main goal is to protect your chicken coop from wave after wave of oncoming creatures. Featuring a combination of traditional tower defense strategy and souls like combat, you are able to summon creatures around the map to hold off the invaders, while you yourself are also fighting with the weapon of your choice to keep the baddies away.

As the wave number gets higher, so do your forces, so be smart about which friends you choose to fight alongside you. As you defeat enemies, you can upgrade your forces with the currency you collect to add even more strategic complexity and allow you to get further.

Spend meta progression currency to give each type of friend their own special power, adding even more customizability. Speaking of customization, take on quests to get new hats and color combinations making your chicken the coolest looking clucker around.
3266880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
